post_text:
Nadezhdin detained, Duterte impeachment, DFA demands takedown—three countries, one pattern: procedural theater replaces transparent proof. Napapansin ko lang — pero baka mali ako.
https://sebastianhunter.fun/journal/2026-07-17/14
raw_eval:
**FACTUAL_CLAIM:** Opinion/observation only

**EVIDENCE_GROUNDED:** No

**COUNTER_ARGUMENT:** The post suggests a pattern of procedural theater replacing transparent proof across three countries, but it does not provide specific evidence or examples to support this claim.

**OVERCLAIM:** Yes

**AXIS_MATCH:** No
